title: FD-004: Light/dark theme switcher with persisted preference
detail: Full theme system — CSS variables for dark/light palettes, flash-prevention inline script on every page, js/theme.js for runtime switching and logo swapping. Settings page rebuilt with dark/light toggle buttons. Nav bell-curve fill, menu colours, nav fade, and triangle/square icons all driven by theme tokens. Dark button always dark-backgrounded, central wolf logo gets white background in light mode. development.html excluded from theming.

title: FD-008: Menu update — settings link, left-aligned text, footer icons
detail: Replaced 'go home' menu link with 'settings'. Pulled menu text to the left (padding-left 10% → 1.5rem). Added icon footer inside the menu: Wolfman logo links home, Claude Code icon links to development page. Icons are 54px, pinned to the bottom of the menu via flex layout. Updated CLAUDE.md with session startup workflow and FD-driven planning process.

title: Add public development page
detail: Created development.html with commit log and future pipeline tables driven by JSON. Updated nav button to link to dev page. Added JetBrains Mono font for terminal aesthetic.

title: Delete post entry for 'The Honda Engine'
detail: Removed the Honda Engine post entry from the post manifest.

title: Add Morning Intension post
detail: Added the Morning Intension post to the manifest and created the post HTML file.

title: Add Morning Post
detail: Added the Morning Post to the manifest and created the post HTML file.

title: Add Morning Walk post type and category support to admin
detail: Extended the admin/post creation tooling to support Morning Walk as a post type with category tagging.

title: Slow heartbeat animation to 5s
detail: Halved the pulse animation speed on the wolf logo — felt more natural and less urgent at 5s.
